arts.ttl: Joshua Zirkzee uses just one word to describe Ruben Amorim as a manager
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has been at Manchester United for almost six months now, and it’s still difficult to get a grip of what he’s all about....

arts.ttl: Old Trafford legend's twin sons combine for two goals as Man United's Under 21s thrash West Brom
arts.sum: Manchester United's under-21 side thrashed West Bromwich Albion 5-1 in the Premier League 2 on Friday evening and there was a familiar name on the scoresheet.

arts.ttl: RVN decision against Chelsea shows Leicester trio could be moved on
arts.sum: Jannik Vestergaard, Odsonne Edouard, and Oliver Skipp have reportedly fallen out of favour with the Leicester City manager Ruud Van Nistelrooy. According to Foxes of Leicester, the three players were recently dropped against Chelsea despite not being injured and that has sent out a strong statement regarding their futures at the club. The report states […] The post RVN decision against Chelsea shows Leicester trio could be moved on appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Club legend reveals how Man United ‘might be able to buy’ 26-year-old in summer
arts.sum: Paul Scholes has revealed what Manchester United need to do to secure Martin Zubimendi’s signature in the summer. An emphatic second-half display against Real Sociedad in the round of 16 second leg of the Europa League secured Manchester United’s spot in the quarter-finals. It was one of their best performances under Ruben Amorim. While the […] The post Club legend reveals how Man United ‘might be able to buy’ 26-year-old in summer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea make final decision over Sancho returning to Man United
arts.sum: Chelsea have no plans to send Jadon Sancho back to Manchester United this summer, despite having a clause that could technically allow them to do so. The 24-year-old winger has shown glimpses of his talent since joining Chelsea on loan, but his performances have been far from spectacular. With just two goals and six assists […] The post Report: Chelsea make final decision over Sancho returning to Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Abuse would lead me to walk away from Man Utd - Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe says he would walk away if he gets "abused" by fans in the same way the Glazer family have.

arts.ttl: Back to Man Utd? Chelsea reveal stance on permanent Sancho transfer
arts.sum: However, according to Ben Jacobs, Chelsea are expected to complete the purchase of Sancho and all parties appear content with the deal that was negotiated last summer. Chelsea will not send Jadon Sancho back to Manchester United this summer, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Former Manchester United hero destroys stars for FAKING IT under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a nightmare season and former star Gordon Strachan has taken aim at players who are just 'floating along' at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man Utd snubbed FIVE managers to appoint boss Sir Jim Ratcliffe says was mistake
arts.sum: Manchester United chief Sir Jim Ratcliffe believes the appointment of David Moyes as Sir Alex Ferguson's replacement was an error, with it later revealed that five other managers were considered

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim 'desperate to sign' Sporting Lisbon star after Geovany Quenda blow
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is reportedly pushing to sign Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres during this summer's transfer window.
